name: Sunndal Sparebank
summary: Sunndal Sparebank, a savings bank, provides banking products and services for private and corporate customers in Norway. It offers payment and card solutions, such as BankID on mobile, bank cards, credit, mobile and online banking, international payments, Visa cards, and VIPPS; auto, building, holiday home, property, income, UNG, health, children, death fall, critical illness, disability, and other insurance, as well as health policies; car loans, mortgages, loans to other vehicles, and loans and refinancing; and savings and pensions, including share savings accounts, bank savings, BSU, fund savings, IPS, retirement savings, deposits pension, and VPS investor services to private customers. The company provides payment and card solutions, such as bank cards, payment terminals, eGiro/OCR, billing, credit, Web and mobile banking, and other payment services; financing solutions, including bank guarantees, construction loans, overdrafts, leasing, and corporate loans; liability, customer's, cyber, farmhouse agriculture, operating equipment and crop, property, health, landlord, home, craft, car, commercial, personal, travel, goods during transport, and occupational injuries insurance; savings and pensions; and other accounts and services to businesses in construction, property, trade and services, and agriculture industries. The company was founded in 1892 and is based in Sunndals√É¬∏ra, Norway.
